name: "Whispers of the Temple"
description: A rare collectible displayed in the display cases of the Temple of Space. Its shape resembles a horn, though whether its call can still be coaxed forth remains a mystery...\nThe treasures resting within these display cases seem to hold fragments of the past in quiet suspension. They wait patiently for later visitors to pause and gaze upon them, so that the long-forgotten stories they carry may slowly stir back to life...
